text:
調達してくれるの！？
嬉しいわ！

セグレズンを見たとき
私の料理人の勘が囁いたのよ。
あの太ももはきっと美味しいって。

地に足をつけず、それでいて
いい具合についているあの筋肉
きっと柔らかな歯ごたえよ。

そう、フワフワ浮いてて
お腹が光ってるやつね。
じゃあ、

You'll go out and get some for me?
Oh, thank you!

There's something to those Segrezuns.
One look with these hardened chef's eyes
of mine, and I knew the meat on those
thighs had to be delish.

Those legs of theirs never touch the ground,
so I guarantee they are nice and soft.
Just a lovely bit of meat to chew on.

Yep, I'm talking about those little floaty
fellas with the shining tummies.
Thanks in advance for getting some for me!
